calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-22-2005 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-17-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: SAUL M. FERSTER, ESQ. APPEARS FOR PLAINTIFF UNITY HOMES, INC.; DEFENDANT LATRESSA SILAS APPEARS IN PRORIA PERSONA.

THE PARTIES PLACE A STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE RECORD AS REGARDS PREMISES AT 1433 KIRKWOOD COURT, SAN FRANCISCO, CA AS FOLLOWS: ON MARCH 1, 2005 DEFENDANT MS. LATRESSA SILAS TO PAY $3,000.00; $1,000.00 FOR ATTORNEY FEES, $1,019.00 TO BE APPLIED TO ARREARAGE OF $3,235.00, and $981.00 FOR RENT FOR MARCH, 2005; BALANCE DUE IS $2,216.00 TO BE PAID FROM APRIL 1, 2005 FOR SIX MONTHS TO BE PAID ON THE FIRST DAY OF THE MONTH IN THE AMOUNT OF $370.00 PER MONTH. DEFENDANT IS TO PAY CURRENT RENT ON THE FIRST OF THE MONTH. IF ALL MONIES PAID, PLAINTIFF WILL DISMISS MATTER WITH PREJUDICE; IF DEFENDANT FAILS TO PAY ANY PAYMENT DUE, PLAINTIFF MAY WITH 24 HOURS NOTICE SEEK EX-PARTE JUDGMENT FORTHWITH FOR IMMEDIATE POSSESSION OF PREMISES FOR RENT DUE; THERE WILL BE NO STAY OF ANY EXECUTION. DEFENDANT SILAS INFORMS COURT SHE AGREES WITH AND UNDERSTANDS THE TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT. THE COURT RECOGNIZES SETTLEMENT AS A STIPULATED AGREEMENT PER SECT. 664.6 CCP.

JUDGE PRO TEM NILS ROSENQUEST; CLERK MARJORIE MANZELLA, REPORTER BELDEN YEE, CSR. (218)
